titleStmt.title: SII 9.181: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 181. (A.R. No. 114 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE BHIMESVARA TEMPLE AT NILAGUNDA, HARPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 35 (current), Vikṛita, Bhādrapada, ba. 11, Ādivāra, Uttarāyana-Saṅkrānti (error) corresponding to A.D. 1110 September 11 Sunday, in the reign of the Chālukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva who was ruling from Kalyāṇa. His Daṇḍanāyakas, Anantapālayya and Muddarasa who were in charge of the toll-revenue, made a gift of a portion of the tolls for the service of the god Bhīmēśvaradēva at Nīrgunda. The record is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddipravarddhamānamūcaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salutta
mire kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati mahāpracaṇḍa
daṇḍanāyaka vibudhavaradāyaka sujanaprasannaṁ nuḍidu mattannaṁ gōtrapavitraṁ
parāṁganāputraṁ vairikritāṁtaṁ sāhasōttuṁganayyanasiṁgaṁ nā
mādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ bhāṇasaverggaḍe daṇḍanā
yaka Anantapālayyaṁgaḷu samasta yade suṁkamaṁ sukhadināḷuttami
ralu . svasti samastarājyabharanirūpitamahāmātyapadavīvirājamā
namānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpannarappa śrīmanmahā
pradhānaṁ pannāyadadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ muddarasaru kirbaṭṭiya suṁkamaṁ
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁdāḷuttamire . svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikra
makālada 35 neya vikritasaṁvatsarada bhādrapada bahuḷa Ēkādasi Āditya
vāra Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti vyatīpātadaṁdu kōgaḷiyaynūṟaṟa kaṁpaṇaṁ
bikkiganerppattaṟa modala kaṁpaṇaṁ śrīmadagrahāraṁ nīrgguṁdada Utta
radisābhāgada śrīsvayaṁbhubhīmēsvaradēvargge naṁddādīvigegaṁ
nivēdyakkaṁ Alliya staḷadalu kā Eleya hēṟu tiṁgaḷiṁge Oṁ
dumaṁ biṭṭaru . Īntī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavaṁ vāraṇāsi Arghyatīrttha kuru
kṣētra prayāgetīrtthavinitaṟalu vēdapāragarappa sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇargge
sāyira kavileya kōḍuvaṁ koḷaguvaṁ paṁcaratnadalu kaṭṭisi koṭṭa pha
ḷamaneyduvaru . Ī dharmmamanāvanorvvaṁ kiḍisidavaṁ vāraṇāsi kuru
kṣētra prayāge Arghyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāsirbbaru brāhmaraṇuvaṁ kavi
leyumaṁ vadhiyisida dōsemaneyduvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēta vasundharāṁ . śaṣṭirvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.181 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
